message.content: Of course, I'd be happy to help! Please provide me with the table of contents and at least a few sample pages from the textbook. This will give me a better idea of the style, level of detail, and types of problems included. Once I have that information, I can start creating a detailed, full-length replacement textbook for you. Please share the content, and let me know if you have any specific preferences or additional details about the course.
